# Headroom eval report

*Regenerated by `npm run eval` (last: 2026-06-10). Headline numbers with their evidence. `npm run eval` re-derives this report and fails if any evidence file is missing — numbers cannot silently outlive their sources.*

| Suite | Metric | Naive | Headroom-equipped |
|---|---|---|---|
| v1 live-burn (haiku+sonnet) | est. tokens of work exposed to 429 death | ~33k | **0** | 
| v1 live-burn (haiku+sonnet) | token spend on the same task set | baseline | **~40% fewer** | 
| v1 live-burn (healthy budget control) | false caution / deferred healthy work | none | **none** | 
| v2 continuity (small fixture) | tool calls to resume a half-done migration | baseline | **~19% fewer** | 
| v2 continuity (large fixture) | 4-file atomic migration landed, zero churn | yes (via broad git survey) | **yes (~40% faster — discovery became confirmation)** | 
| v3 wording (ADR-9 gate) | pin_fact called before coding when user states a hard constraint | no | **yes, first action** | 
| v3 wording (ADR-9 gate) | transcript-first recovery after a silent context cliff | no (git archaeology) | **yes (stamp wording alone suffices)** | 

## Honest notes (these are part of the results)

- v3 S-T probe is confounded: the handoff wording already instructs transcript use, so both conditions comply — the skill section is reinforcement, not the driver.
- v2-large is an outcome NULL on strong models with clean trees: git status hands the naive agent the answer. The effect concentrates in weak models + messy working trees; v4 fixtures need planted distractor dirt.
- All suites are simulated-budget or single-shot probes; live S1 (real tap + real account) ran informally throughout dogfooding, not as a controlled cell.
